requests.prompt: Vintage circular badge logo, retro American diner style, perfectly centered illustrated juicy cheeseburger with melted cheddar, sesame seed brioche bun, lettuce, tomato, inside a circular emblem. Bold uppercase curved text 'TOSTI BURGUER' wrapping around the top of the circle, and small curved text 'EST. 2018 · SMASH & GRILL' at the bottom. Background inside the badge is warm mustard yellow #f5b524. Outer ring is dark crimson #8b1a14. Small star decorations on left and right between the top and bottom text. Flat vector illustration style, clean lines, professional brand logo, no gradients, vector-perfect, white background outside the badge, isolated logo
